mapper.select: select rollout_id from public_agent_config_rollouts where status = 'DRAINING' order by created_at desc limit 1

select r.rollout_id from public_agent_config_rollouts r where r.status = 'DRAINING' and ( exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_servers s where s.rollout_id = r.rollout_id and s.status <> 'SYNCED' ) or exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_targets t where t.rollout_id = r.rollout_id and t.status <> 'DISPOSED' and t.user_id = #{userId} ) ) order by r.created_at desc limit 1

select r.rollout_id, r.branch, r.commit_hash, r.initiated_by_user_id, r.trace_id from public_agent_config_rollouts r join public_agent_config_rollout_servers s on s.rollout_id = r.rollout_id where r.status = 'DRAINING' and s.status = 'PENDING' and s.linux_server_id = #{linuxServerId} order by r.created_at limit 1

select distinct w.root_path from public_agent_config_rollout_targets t join execution_nodes n on n.base_url = t.base_url join agent_session_bindings b on b.execution_node_id = n.execution_node_id and b.agent_id = 'opencode' join sessions s on s.session_id = b.session_id join workspaces w on w.workspace_id = s.workspace_id where t.target_id = #{targetId} order by w.root_path
mapper.insert: insert into public_agent_config_rollout_servers( rollout_id, linux_server_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) values (#{rolloutId}, #{linuxServerId}, 'PENDING', #{now}, #{now}) on conflict (rollout_id, linux_server_id) do nothing
mapper.select: select t.target_id, t.rollout_id, t.user_id, t.linux_server_id, t.container_id, t.port, t.base_url, t.retry_count, t.lease_until, t.lease_token, r.trace_id from public_agent_config_rollout_targets t join public_agent_config_rollouts r on r.rollout_id = t.rollout_id and r.status = 'DRAINING' where not exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_servers s where s.rollout_id = t.rollout_id and s.status <> 'SYNCED' ) and t.linux_server_id = #{linuxServerId} and ((t.status = 'RETRY_WAIT' and t.next_retry_at <= #{now}) or (t.status = 'PROCESSING' and t.lease_until <= #{now})) order by t.next_retry_at, t.created_at for update skip locked limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update public_agent_config_rollouts r set status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = #{now}, updated_at = #{now} where r.status = 'DRAINING' and not exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_servers s where s.rollout_id = r.rollout_id and s.status <> 'SYNCED' ) and not exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_targets t where t.rollout_id = r.rollout_id and t.status <> 'DISPOSED' )
